topic: The hormonal cascade of PMS in 4 stages
caption: Did you know PMS is more than just mood swings? 🌕 It's a 4-stage hormonal cascade that affects 75% of women. 💔 Here are the facts: 📝 1) Estrogen drop triggers it, 2) Progesterone surge worsens symptoms, 3) Serotonin and dopamine fluctuations cause mood swings, and 4) Inflammation peaks right before your period. 🌟 Save this so you don't lose it. Share with someone who needs to see this. Follow @healthrecode for daily science-backed health. Don't forget — your future body will thank you. 💖 #PMS #HormonalHealth #WomensHealth #PeriodPower #MentalHealthMatters #HormoneBalance #WellnessForWomen #ScienceBacked
